adm_check.recommendation: From 10 December 2026, if you use automated decision-making with legal or similarly significant effect (e.g., credit scoring, eligibility decisions), you must disclose: (1) the use of automated systems; (2) how they work; (3) personal information used; (4) the significant effect; (5) mechanism to request human review; and (6) right to object.
